next: This is a Next.js project — a React framework for building websites with fast page loads and server-side rendering.
react: This is a React project — it builds interactive user interfaces from reusable components.
vue: This is a Vue.js project — a progressive framework for building user interfaces.
angular: This is an Angular project — a full-featured framework for building large-scale web applications.
svelte: This is a Svelte project — a compiler that creates lightweight, fast web interfaces.
express: This project uses Express — a web server that handles HTTP requests and responses.
fastapi: This project uses FastAPI — a modern Python web framework for building APIs quickly.
django: This is a Django project — a batteries-included Python web framework.
flask: This project uses Flask — a lightweight Python web framework.
electron: This is an Electron app — a web technology turned into a desktop application.
tauri: This is a Tauri app — a lightweight framework for building desktop apps.
react-native: This is a React Native app — builds mobile apps for iOS and Android using React.
gatsby: This is a Gatsby site — generates fast static websites from React components.
nuxt: This is a Nuxt.js project — the Vue equivalent of Next.js for server-rendered apps.
nest: This project uses NestJS — a structured Node.js framework inspired by Angular.
rails: This is a Ruby on Rails project — a convention-over-configuration web framework.
spring: This is a Spring project — Java's most popular enterprise application framework.
laravel: This is a Laravel project — an elegant PHP web framework.
tensorflow: This project uses TensorFlow — a framework for building and training AI models.
pytorch: This project uses PyTorch — a research-friendly machine learning framework.
vite: This project uses Vite — a blazing-fast development server and build tool.
